category_name.es: Sistemas de RR. HH. y Nómina

category_description.en: Requests and issue resolution related to HR systems, employee records, and payroll.
category_description.es: Solicitudes y resolución de problemas relacionados con sistemas de recursos humanos, registros de empleados y nómina.
category_description.fr: Demandes et résolution de problèmes liés aux systèmes RH, aux dossiers des employés et à la paie.
category_description.ko: 인사 정보 혹은 급여 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

category_description.en: Report issues related to work logs or attendance records.
category_description.es: Informe problemas relacionados con registros de trabajo o asistencia.
category_description.fr: Signaler des problèmes liés aux journaux de travail ou aux enregistrements de présence.
category_description.ko: 근무 일지나 출근 기록에 이상이 있는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

category_placeholder.en: Please include the affected date(s) and details of the attendance issue.
category_placeholder.es: Incluya la(s) fecha(s) afectada(s) y los detalles del problema.
category_placeholder.fr: Veuillez inclure la ou les dates concernées et les détails du problème.
category_placeholder.ko: 문제가 발생한 날짜와 이상 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

category_description.en: Report issues related to processed or paid payroll.
category_description.es: Informe problemas relacionados con nóminas ya procesadas o pagadas.
category_description.fr: Signaler des problèmes liés à une paie déjà traitée ou versée.
category_description.ko: 이미 지급된 급여가 이상이 있는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

category_placeholder.en: Please include the pay period and details of the payroll issue.
category_placeholder.es: Incluya el período de pago y los detalles del problema.
category_placeholder.fr: Veuillez inclure la période de paie et les détails du problème.
category_placeholder.ko: 문제가 발생한 날짜와 급여 이상 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

category_name.es: Problema del sistema de permisos / vacaciones

category_description.en: Report issues related to leave or vacation management systems.
category_description.es: Informe problemas relacionados con el sistema de gestión de permisos o vacaciones.
category_description.fr: Signaler des problèmes liés au système de gestion des congés.
category_description.ko: 휴가와 연차에 관련된 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

category_placeholder.en: Please include the affected date(s) and leave or vacation details.
category_placeholder.es: Incluya la(s) fecha(s) afectada(s) y los detalles del permiso o vacaciones.
category_placeholder.fr: Veuillez inclure la ou les dates concernées et les détails du congé.
category_placeholder.ko: 문제가 발생한 날짜와 휴가 혹은 연차 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

category_description.en: Request corrections to employee profile information.
category_description.es: Solicite correcciones en la información del perfil del empleado.
category_description.fr: Demande de correction des informations du profil de l’employé.
category_description.ko: 직원 프로필을 올바르게 수정할 수 있게 요청합니다.

category_placeholder.en: Please include the employee details and the information to be corrected.
category_placeholder.es: Incluya los datos del empleado y la información a corregir.
category_placeholder.fr: Veuillez inclure les informations de l’employé et les éléments à corriger.
category_placeholder.ko: 수정이 필요한 직원 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.
